# Fuse Inventory

Fuse Inventory is a self-hosted infrastructure inventory and dependency mapping tool for DevOps teams. It helps model applications, environments, platforms, dependencies, credentials, risk, and documentation in one place.

## Key pages
- Home: https://fuse-inventory.dev/
- Features: https://fuse-inventory.dev/features
- Screenshots: https://fuse-inventory.dev/screenshots

## Useful references
- GitHub repository: https://github.com/lazerduck/fuse-inventory
- Container image: https://github.com/users/lazerduck/packages/container/package/fuse-inventory
- Main README: https://github.com/lazerduck/fuse-inventory/blob/main/README.md

## Notes
- The site is a Vue single-page app.
- Crawl files are available at /robots.txt and /sitemap.xml.
